svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="云效流水线四阶段" id="pipeline"> <mxGraphModel dx="-456" dy="-131" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1169" pageHeight="826" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1;" value="云效 CI/CD 流水线：代码提交到生产部署" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="430" x="320" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="stage1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#2563eb;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="① 代码提交触发" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="140" x="40" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="stage1_desc" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;" value="push 到主分支
或提 MR
自动触发" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="140" x="40" y="245" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="stage2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="② 构建 + 测试 + 扫描" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="160" x="240" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s2a" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="mvn package
npm run build" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="140" x="250" y="195" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s2b" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="单测 + 契约测试" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="140" x="250" y="228" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s2c" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="SonarQube 静态扫描" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="140" x="250" y="261" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="gate2" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#dc2626;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;" value="失败即熔断 ✕" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="150" x="245" y="278" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="stage3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="③ 制品打包入库" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="140" x="460" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="stage3_desc" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;" value="Docker 镜像 / jar
推到云效制品仓库
带 git commit hash" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="150" x="455" y="245" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="stage4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f1f5f9;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="④ 三环境部署" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="160" x="660" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s4a" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="dev（冒烟测试）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="140" x="670" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s4b" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="staging（冒烟测试）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="140" x="670" y="223" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s4c" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="prod（全量上线）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="140" x="670" y="256" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="gate4" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#dc2626;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;" value="每环境冒烟挂 → 熔断 ✕" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="170" x="655" y="278" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e12" edge="1" parent="1" source="stage1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#2563eb;endArrow=block;fillColor=#2563eb;fontSize=11;" target="stage2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e23" edge="1" parent="1" source="stage2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#2563eb;endArrow=block;fillColor=#2563eb;" target="stage3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e34" edge="1" parent="1" source="stage3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#2563eb;endArrow=block;fillColor=#2563eb;" target="stage4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="footnote" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=2;" value="把「能不能上线」从「我觉得没问题」变成「机器验证没问题」" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="25" width="450" x="280" y="330" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
